feed.title: waveslab
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Brief Talk on AutoResearch by Dr. Alberto Zancanaro

link.title: Brief Talk on AutoResearch by Dr. Alberto Zancanaro

entry.content:
Our former lab member, Dr. Alberto Zancanaro, will give a brief talk on AutoResearch on July 16th at 10:00 AM.

Wish to listen? You can attend the talk here.
entry.summary: Former lab member Dr. Alberto Zancanaro will give a brief talk on AutoResearch on July 16th at 10 am.

entry.title: Welcoming Visiting Student Yusuf Üveyik!
entry.content:
The WavesLab warmly welcomes Yusuf Üveyik, a BSc student from Marmara University of Istanbul (Turkey)!

Yusuf will be joining us as a visiting student from July 14th to September 30th. We are thrilled to have him on board for the summer!
entry.summary: The WavesLab welcomes Yusuf Üveyik, BSc student from Marmara University, as a visiting student.
